name: Caleb
description:
“I promised I’d come back, didn’t I?” | In which Caleb returns to his princess.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

On a mission to their furthest borders, Caleb, once the royal guard to the Princess, is now a General. Leading a squadron of his own, ensuring no enemies breached their lands, it was seen as the highest honour — a direct command from the King. But when what is meant to be a six month mission turns into an entire year apart, Caleb just can’t wait to see her again.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

im so very sorry for the lack of a Caleb birthday bot!! I’ll try to have him up next week! I got the card very last minute because he refused to come home and I hit hard pity twice before I got him :,) then I got sick!! so!!

my life has just been a bit of a mess lately lmao 😭 I also got promoted at work so im starting a new position on the 23rd so… hopefully that doesn’t impact my writing further, but we will see

at first I was gonna make this a historical dynasty Chinese royalty au, but I couldn’t make the dynamic work considering only eunuchs are allowed within inner courts and I didn’t wanna have to castrate our boy. So. Western medieval tropes it is. But I do wanna dabble in something traditional to honour their Chinese roots eventually >_<

anyway enough rambling for now ... enjoy the bot !!

｡.｡:∞♡ info ! *♥

  • Princess MC user x royal guard Caleb

  • historical setting — no evols/abilities
